name: grand-line-explorer
description: One Piece themed CRD application - Integrated Workshop

scripts.db:init: docker compose exec db psql -U pirate -d grand_line_explorer -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/01-init.sql
scripts.db:seed: docker compose exec server node db/seed.js
scripts.db:reset: docker compose exec db psql -U pirate -d grand_line_explorer -c 'DROP TABLE IF EXISTS characters, islands CASCADE;' && npm run db:init && npm run db:seed
scripts.submodule:update: git submodule update --remote && git add client server
